from fastapi import APIRouter

router = APIRouter()

# Correct: enforce a consistent, predictable response envelope shape across all endpoints in the API
@router.get("/users")
def get_users():
    return {"data": [{"id": 1}], "meta": {"count": 1}}

@router.get("/products")
def get_products():
    return {"data": [{"id": 99}], "meta": {"count": 1}}
